description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat roof and a sprawling, angular footprint. The exterior features a mix of white and gray surfaces, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. A prominent entryway is accessed via a raised walkway over a water feature, adding a dramatic and contemporary touch. The structure includes multiple sections, some with brick or stone cladding, and a spacious outdoor terrace area. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall, and the layout suggests open-plan living spaces with several rooms visible through the windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a dramatic entryway over a water feature. The exterior combines white and gray surfaces with brick accents and a spacious terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a raised walkway over water, large windows, and the main living areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the terrace area, additional rooms, and the continuation of the water feature.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, multiple window arrangements, and the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more private sections, additional entry points, and the angular layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a raised walkway over a water feature, flat door, and minimal overhang
